title: selaginella whitmeei
intro: Selaginella whitmeei, also known as the 'White Mee's Spikemoss', is a type of flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella whitmeei include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Selaginella whitmeei is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
